title: Jira Service Desk
excerpt: Is there any plans to integrate Jira Service Desk with Monday?

posts.author: cfraticelli (Celene Fraticelli)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any plans to integrate Jira Service Desk with Monday?

posts.author: Scotland (Scotland Miller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cfraticelli,

I am a sales representative from 729 Solutions. We are a systems integration specialist and monday.com services partner. If you would like to have a chat about your Jira integration send me an email at scotland@729solutions.com and we can chat! Every week we build custom connectors for all kinds of systems and have familiarity with Jira.

-Scotland Miller

posts.author: JacekWizmur (Jacek Wizmur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I’m the Co-Founder of Getint.io platform, we’re experts in Jira/ServiceNow/Asana/Monday/Zendesk related integrations. One of our apps is supporting integrations between Jira Service Desk, and Monday.com. It’s very easy to use (3 min setup).
We can help you with integrating Monday with JSD with all the custom fields, attachments, comments, assignees, and more
You can read more here (JSD Monday integration)
best,
Jacek

posts.author: ivangarcia (Ivan Garcia _Appfire_)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I don’t really know if there are any plans of integrating JSM with monday. But in the meantime, if you want to display your Jira Service Desk data on monday dashboards and you’re up for trying an app, Dashboard Hub for monday.com could greatly alleviate your pain.

Dashboard Hub is an app that empowers anyone in the team to easily create and share powerful dashboards with formulas, custom charts and nearly 100 metrics – regardless of technical skills.

You can integrate the Atlassian suite of products into your dashboards, including Jira Service Desk with 8 gadgets, such as Created vs Resolved Requests, Time to First Response, Time to Resolution and SLA Accomplishment.

Why don’t you try it out 14 days for free?

Iván García, Product Marketing Manager

Dashboard Hub for monday.com1200×680 95.2 KB

posts.author: JoeH (Joe Hardin)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been using GetInt and it is hands down better than any jira integration that anyone else has attempted (including the native one in monday.com). Jacek’s team is also good at customer support as well.

posts.author: JacekWizmur (Jacek Wizmur)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Joe!
